overview: A job portal platform where candidates upload resumes and get automatically matched against open job postings using AI. Candidates see a transparent dashboard of their match scores with a side-by-side breakdown per job. Admins create job postings with defined requirements.
features: Candidate account creation with name and email
Resume upload with automatic AI-powered matching
Candidate match dashboard showing scores per job (e.g. 85%, 72%, 65%)
Side-by-side breakdown comparing candidate profile vs job requirements
Admin panel for creating job postings with constraints
Transparent fairness — candidates always see their match results
